name: Business Model Canvas
summary: A one-page framework that maps the 9 building blocks of how a business creates, delivers, and captures value.
whenToUseIt: When launching a new business, evaluating a startup, understanding a competitor's model, or presenting a business overview.
example: Airbnb — value prop is affordable unique stays, customer segments are travellers and hosts, channels are app/web/social, revenue from service fees, key resource is the platform and trust system, key partnership with property owners, cost structure is tech and support.
